title: Because and so
subtitle: Connect reason and result.
overview: Read the English aloud, understand the Chinese, then answer with your own real information.

sections.title: A1 focus
rows: I study English because I need it.
我学英语，因为我需要它。
I was tired, so I went home early.
我累了，所以早早回家了。
I study English because I need it for daily life.
我学英语，因为日常生活需要它。

items.en: I study English because I need it.
items.zh: 我学英语，因为我需要它。

items.en: I was tired, so I went home early.
items.zh: 我累了，所以早早回家了。

items.en: I study English because I need it for daily life.
items.zh: 我学英语，因为日常生活需要它。

items.en: Now make one sentence about your real life.
items.zh: 现在造一个关于你真实生活的句子。

items.en: Read it aloud three times: slow, clear, natural.

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I study English because I need it for daily life.
lines.zh: 我学英语，因为日常生活需要它。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you say it one more time, slowly?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I study English because I need it for daily life.
lines.zh: 我学英语，因为日常生活需要它。

items.en: I study English because I need it.
items.zh: 我学英语，因为我需要它。

items.en: I was tired, so I went home early.
items.zh: 我累了，所以早早回家了。

items.en: Change one word and say it again.
Use the sentence today if you can.
items.zh: 如果可以，今天就使用这个句子。
